text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #2)
>Hm, well, imlib should be pulled by openbox itself, but if it's a direct >dependency, then it needs to be mentioned explicitly. 
You're right. After a forced rebuild openbox problem is solved. Please close ticket, patch not required.
I'm sorry, but I do not deep enough to investigate the issue.

>But why are you adding USE_GCC?
Earlier i have a trouble when building with clang, but currently cannot reproduce it. Probably now  it unnecessary.
